berenike.name: Berenike
berenike.body: Upper Egypt, East Bank. Immediate Bonus: 12 Gold. Features a Gold Mine (+8 Gold every harvest).
berenike.details: The most profitable Gold Mine in the game. Provides a massive 12 gold head-start upon acquisition.
berenike.extra: Region: Upper Egypt | Bank: East | Gold Mine: +8 | Bonus: 12 Gold

abu.name: Abu (Elephantine)
abu.body: Upper Egypt, West Bank. Contains a Temple. Immediate Bonus: 1 Free Stone. Features a Gold Mine (+4 Gold every harvest).
abu.summary: Upper Egypt - Temple and Gold Mine
abu.details: A strategic hybrid province. It provides steady income and a victory point location via the temple.
abu.extra: Region: Upper Egypt | Bank: West | Temple: Yes | Gold Mine: +4 | Bonus: 1 Stone

edfu.name: Edfu
edfu.body: Upper Egypt, East Bank. Contains a Temple. Immediate Bonus: 1 Power Card.
edfu.details: A standard temple province. The power card provides immediate tactical flexibility.
edfu.extra: Region: Upper Egypt | Bank: East | Temple: Yes | Bonus: 1 Power Card

kharga.name: Kharga
kharga.body: Upper Egypt, West Bank. Immediate Bonus: 1 Free Stone. Features a Caravan (+10 Gold if Nile level is 1 or 2).
kharga.details: Provides a massive payout during low-flood years, making it a gamble on the Nile's behavior.
kharga.extra: Region: Upper Egypt | Bank: West | Caravan: +10 | Bonus: 1 Stone

abydos.name: Abydos
abydos.body: Upper Egypt, East Bank. Contains a Temple. Immediate Bonus: 1 Free Stone. Provides 4 Favor Icons.
abydos.summary: Upper Egypt - Temple and high card limit
abydos.details: Unique for Upper Egypt, this province allows you to buy up to 4 items in the market phase.
abydos.extra: Region: Upper Egypt | Bank: East | Temple: Yes | Favor: 4 | Bonus: 1 Stone

sawu.name: Sawu
sawu.body: Upper Egypt, West Bank. Immediate Bonus: 1 Power Card. Features a Caravan (+12 Gold if Nile level is 1 or 2).
sawu.details: The most valuable caravan in the game, but yields nothing if the Nile floods heavily.
sawu.extra: Region: Upper Egypt | Bank: West | Caravan: +12 | Bonus: 1 Power Card

thebes.name: Thebes
thebes.body: Upper Egypt, East Bank. Contains a Temple. Immediate Bonus: 2 Power Cards.
thebes.details: A high-value religious center that builds your hand of power cards quickly.
thebes.extra: Region: Upper Egypt | Bank: East | Temple: Yes | Bonus: 2 Power Cards

bahariya.name: Bahariya
bahariya.body: Lower Egypt, West Bank. Provides 2 Favor Icons. Immediate Bonus: 1 Farmer.
bahariya.details: A standard northern province. Good for farming and moderate card-buying capacity.
bahariya.extra: Region: Lower Egypt | Bank: West | Favor: 2 | Bonus: 1 Farmer

amarna.name: Amarna
amarna.body: Lower Egypt, East Bank. Provides 2 Favor Icons. Immediate Bonus: 1 Stone and 1 Farmer.
amarna.details: Great for getting a pyramid started immediately due to the free stone and farmer.
amarna.extra: Region: Lower Egypt | Bank: East | Favor: 2 | Bonus: 1 Stone, 1 Farmer

damanhur.name: Damanhur
damanhur.body: Lower Egypt, West Bank. Contains a Temple. Provides 1 Favor Icon. Immediate Bonus: 1 Free Stone.
damanhur.details: One of the three temple locations in the North. Crucial for scoring points in the Old and New Kingdoms.
damanhur.extra: Region: Lower Egypt | Bank: West | Temple: Yes | Favor: 1 | Bonus: 1 Stone

mendes.name: Mendes
mendes.body: Lower Egypt, East Bank. Provides 2 Favor Icons. Immediate Bonus: 1 Stone and 1 Power Card.
mendes.details: Offers a balanced start with resources and a tactical card.
mendes.extra: Region: Lower Egypt | Bank: East | Favor: 2 | Bonus: 1 Stone, 1 Power Card

memphis.name: Memphis
memphis.body: Lower Egypt, West Bank. Contains a Temple. Immediate Bonus: 1 Farmer and 1 Power Card.
memphis.details: A very strong province that sets up your food production and your temple scoring simultaneously.
memphis.extra: Region: Lower Egypt | Bank: West | Temple: Yes | Bonus: 1 Farmer, 1 Power Card

alexandria.name: Alexandria
alexandria.body: Lower Egypt, East Bank. Provides 3 Favor Icons. Immediate Bonus: 2 Power Cards.
alexandria.details: The best province for players focusing on Power Cards, both for the immediate draw and the high favor limit.
alexandria.extra: Region: Lower Egypt | Bank: East | Favor: 3 | Bonus: 2 Power Cards

avaris.name: Avaris
avaris.body: Lower Egypt, West Bank. Immediate Bonus: 1 Farmer. Features a Caravan (+8 Gold if Nile level is 1 or 2).
avaris.details: Combines traditional farming with extra income during dry years.
avaris.extra: Region: Lower Egypt | Bank: West | Caravan: +8 | Bonus: 1 Farmer

dakhla.name: Dakhla
dakhla.body: Lower Egypt, East Bank. Contains a Temple. Immediate Bonus: 12 Gold and 1 Power Card.
dakhla.details: Often the most expensive auction because of the massive gold and card injection provided immediately.
dakhla.extra: Region: Lower Egypt | Bank: East | Temple: Yes | Bonus: 12 Gold, 1 Power Card
